page: Microsoft Azure F4-2ams_v7 is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine belonging to the Famsv7 server family. It is equipped with 2 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD processor and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The server features 32.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 16.0 GB per vCPU.

This instance does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met through external network-attached options, though the system is premium storage capable. It does not include any complimentary public IPv4 addresses. There are no onboard GPUs, making it unsuitable for hardware-accelerated graphics or parallel computing workloads.

Given the high memory density relative to the virtual CPU count, this configuration offers qualitative cost efficiency for memory-bound workloads that do not require massive parallel processing power. It is designed for memory-intensive applications, small-scale databases, caching layers, and enterprise applications requiring a large memory footprint with moderate compute requirements.
description: Microsoft Azure F4-2ams_v7 is an x86_64 memory-optimized virtual machine from the Famsv7 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 2 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD processor and is configured with 32.0 GB of system memory, providing a high ratio of 16.0 GB of RAM per vCPU. The instance does not include local storage, requiring external premium storage solutions for data persistence, and has no integrated GPUs. This hardware profile is designed for memory-intensive workloads that require a substantial memory footprint relative to compute resources. It is suited for applications such as in-memory caching, small database deployments, and enterprise applications with moderate processing demands but high memory capacity requirements.
og_description: Microsoft Azure F4-2ams_v7 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 2 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 32.0 GB of RAM, and no local storage, designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure F4-2ams_v7 is a memory-optimized VM with 2 dedicated AMD vCPUs and 32.0 GB of RAM, running on Microsoft Hyper-V.
tagline: A memory-intensive virtual machine featuring a high memory-to-core ratio for caching and database workloads requiring minimal compute resources.
